result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- handled cases: union of owners appearing as old or new during period
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(new_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS today,
         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.today
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- handled cases: union of owners appearing as old or new during period
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(new_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (

         (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate

  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')

-- transfers count for old owner when reassigned
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM case_owner_events

-- handled cases: union of owners appearing as old or new during period
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION

handled_counts AS (

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.today
  WHERE lower(trim(ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(new_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS today,
         (TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt
),
case_owner_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch

transfers AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''

),
handled AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(old_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT regexp_replace(trim(new_owner), '^#', '') AS agent_id, case_id
  FROM case_owner_events
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND trim(new_owner) <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id)::bigint AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY 1
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
)
SELECT hc.agent_id AS id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = hc.agent_id
